settings.title: About us
settings.text:
‎ ‎

‎

Sideshow Productions: Your trusted tattoo shop founded in 2020

Tattoo shop located in Murray, Utah offering tattoos, piercings, teeth whitening, tooth gems and other services.

We have given to numerous nonprofit organizations, including:
Breast Cancer Research Foundation, Brighton Recovery,
Fit To Recover, Humane Society of Utah, and Toys for Tots.

We offer a clean, sterile, friendly environment for our clients and artists.

Great vibes. Come check us out!

‎

Our Journey:

  • Customer Trust: Our commitment to honesty and quality service has earned us a spot in everyone's hearts (and skin lol)
  • High Ratings: With over 213 reviews and an impressive 4.6 star average rating, our reputation speaks for itself.
  • Community Engagement: Our active participation and donations to various nonprofit organizations reflect our dedication to the community's well-being and our belief in giving back.

‎ ‎

Our Promises:

  • Expertise and Quality: Every artist at Sideshow Productions is selected for their exceptional skill and dedication to craft, using only the highest quality materials to ensure your art is not just safe but lasts a lifetime.
  • Privacy and Confidentiality: We guarantee the utmost discretion with your designs and personal information, offering secure data handling and the option for private sessions to meet your comfort level.
  • Healthy and Safe Environment: Our commitment to your well-being is reflected in our rigorous sterilization protocols, continuous staff training on health and safety, and a client-first approach that ensures a clean, welcoming space for all.

<style>
@media screen and (min-width: 769.1px) {
    .hero__inner {
        padding-top: 60px;
        padding-bottom: 159px;
    }
}
.meety-chooser-btn.primary, .meety-continue-btn.primary {
    background: #111;
    color: #fff;
    border-color: #111;
    width: 100%;
}
.meety-step-service .menu-slot {
    margin-top: 8px;
    display: flex
;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 18px;
}
select:not(.disabled):not([disabled]):hover, select:not(.disabled):not([disabled]):focus {
    opacity: 1;
    color: #000000;
    background-color: #ececec;
    border-color: #e6e6e6;
    -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 0 .2rem #cccccc;
    -moz-box-shadow: 0 0 0 .2rem #cccccc;
    -ms-box-shadow: 0 0 0 .2rem #cccccc;
    -o-box-shadow: 0 0 0 .2rem #cccccc;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 .2rem #ccc;
}
.meety-service-row select {
    flex: 1 1 auto;
    padding: .6rem .75rem;
    border: 1px solid #000000;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: .95rem;
}
ul, ol {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0px;
  padding-left: 0px;
}

.main-content {
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    background: #000000;
}
.btn-top.btn-top-center {
    left: 50%;
    margin-left: -22.5px;
    color: #fff;
    border: white;
    display: none;
}

.w-layout-grid.grid-2 {
    display: flex !important
;
}

/* Make portfolio backgrounds contain instead of cover */
.author-opened-wrapper .portfolio-image,
.author-opened-wrapper .portfolio-image._1,
.author-opened-wrapper .portfolio-image._2,
.author-opened-wrapper .portfolio-image._3,
.author-opened-wrapper .portfolio-image._4 {
  background-size: cover !important;   /* override the 'cover' */
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-color: #000;                /* optional “letterbox” fill */
}

/* object-fit does nothing on divs, remove/neutralize it */
.portfolio-image { object-fit: initial; }
/* Portfolio images contained inside their box */
.author-opened-wrapper .grid-2 img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;  /* Ensures full image is visible */
  object-position: center;
  background-color: #000; /* Optional: fill gaps with black */
}

.button-wrapper-center.fixed-middle {
    position: fixed;
    left: 50%;
    bottom: calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + -10px); /* Adjust -10px as needed */
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 100%;
    z-index: 9999;
}
.meety-buttons {
  display: none;
}
.background-image-artist {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}


/* Target the “Collection Item” grid child */
.collection-item {
  /* start on column 1, span 1 column */
  grid-column: 1 / 2;
  /* start on row 1, span 1 row */
  grid-row: 1 / 2;

  /* center it in both axes */
  justify-self: center;
  align-self: center;
}

.collection-item {
    grid-column: 1 / 6;
    grid-row: 1 / 2;
    justify-self: center;
    align-self: center;
}

</style>

settings.title: GSAP ANIMATION
settings.code:
<!-- GSAP v3 -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/gsap@3/dist/gsap.min.js"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const prefersReduced = window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;
  const mq            = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 991px)'); // tablet & below = true
  const headerSection = document.querySelector('.sticky-header .header-section');
  const announcement  = document.querySelector('.announcement-section');

  // --- helpers for scroll lock / restore ---
  const getScrollbarWidth = () => window.innerWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth;

  // --- Loyalty button handling ---
  const BON_SELECTOR = '#bon-loyalty-btn';
  const getBon = () => document.querySelector(BON_SELECTOR);

  document.querySelectorAll('.author-wrapper').forEach(wrapper => {
    // Scoped elements
    const opened        = wrapper.querySelector('.author-opened-wrapper');
    const leftPane      = wrapper.querySelector('.author-opened-left');
    const rightPane     = wrapper.querySelector('.author-opened-right');
    const closeBtn      = wrapper.querySelector('.author-close-button');
    const circle        = wrapper.querySelector('.circle-animation');
    const grid2         = wrapper.querySelector('.w-layout-grid.grid-2');
    const secondBtn     = wrapper.querySelector('.button-wrapper .btn:nth-child(2)');
    const fixedMiddle   = wrapper.querySelector('.button-wrapper-center.fixed-middle');

    // Mobile extra reveals
    const heading3      = wrapper.querySelector('.heading-3');
    const dividerBlack  = wrapper.querySelector('.divider-65.black');
    const paragraph2    = wrapper.querySelector('.paragraph-2');
    const socialWrapper = wrapper.querySelector('.author-social-media-wrapper');

    if (!opened || !leftPane || !rightPane || !circle) return;

    // Start hidden
    gsap.set(opened, { display: 'none' });
    if (grid2) gsap.set(grid2, { autoAlpha: 0 });

    const dur     = prefersReduced ? 0 : 0.7;
    const durFast = prefersReduced ? 0 : 0.5;

    // Helper: what display should the opened wrapper use right now?
    const openedDisplay = () => (mq.matches ? 'flex' : 'grid');

    // --- Loyalty button helpers (hide while open, restore on close; handles async injection) ---
    let bonObserver = null;
    let bonOriginalStyle = null;

    const hideBon = () => {
      const b = getBon();
      if (!b) return;
      if (bonOriginalStyle === null) bonOriginalStyle = b.getAttribute('style');
      b.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      gsap.set(b, { display: 'none', pointerEvents: 'none', autoAlpha: 0 });
    };

    const startBonObserver = () => {
      if (bonObserver) return;
      bonObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
        const b = getBon();
        if (b && b.style.display !== 'none') hideBon();
      });
      bonObserver.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    };

    const restoreBon = () => {
      if (bonObserver) { bonObserver.disconnect(); bonObserver = null; }
      const b = getBon();
      if (!b) { bonOriginalStyle = null; return; }
      b.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
      if (bonOriginalStyle === null) b.removeAttribute('style');
      else b.setAttribute('style', bonOriginalStyle);
      bonOriginalStyle = null;
    };

    // --- scroll state per wrapper ---
    let savedScrollY = 0;
    let addedPaddingRight = 0;

    const lockScroll = () => {
      savedScrollY = window.scrollY || window.pageYOffset || 0;

      // prevent layout shift when scrollbar vanishes
      const sw = getScrollbarWidth();
      if (sw > 0) {
        addedPaddingRight = sw;
        document.body.style.paddingRight = sw + 'px';
        document.documentElement.style.paddingRight = sw + 'px';
      }

      // lock the body at current position (most robust cross-browser)
      document.body.style.position = 'fixed';
      document.body.style.top = `-${savedScrollY}px`;
      document.body.style.left = '0';
      document.body.style.right = '0';
      document.body.style.width = '100%';

      // (optional) also disable overflow for safety
      document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    };

    const unlockScroll = () => {
      // restore styles
      document.body.style.position = '';
      document.body.style.top = '';
      document.body.style.left = '';
      document.body.style.right = '';
      document.body.style.width = '';
      document.documentElement.style.overflow = '';

      if (addedPaddingRight) {
        document.body.style.paddingRight = '';
        document.documentElement.style.paddingRight = '';
        addedPaddingRight = 0;
      }

      // return to the exact spot
      window.scrollTo(0, savedScrollY || 0);
    };

    // OPEN timeline
    const openTL = gsap.timeline({
      paused: true,
      defaults: { ease: 'power2.out' },
      onStart() {
        lockScroll();
        opened.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');

        // Hide BON loyalty button while open (and keep hiding if it injects late)
        hideBon();
        startBonObserver();
      }
    });

    openTL
      .set([headerSection, announcement], { zIndex: -99 })
      .to(circle, { width: '200vw', height: '200vw', duration: durFast, ease: 'power4.inOut' })
      .set(circle, { display: 'none' })
      // Use grid on desktop, flex on tablet & below
      .set(opened, { display: openedDisplay })
      // Right slides in
      .fromTo(rightPane, { xPercent: 100 }, { xPercent: 0, duration: dur }, '<0.05')
      // Left fades in
      .fromTo(leftPane,  { autoAlpha: 0 },  { autoAlpha: 1, duration: dur * 0.85 }, '<0.2');

    // Tablet & below extra reveals (original flex flow)
    if (mq.matches) {
      openTL
        .fromTo(heading3,      { y: '40vh', autoAlpha: 0 }, { y: 0, autoAlpha: 1, duration: dur }, '-=0.4')
        .fromTo(dividerBlack,  { y: '40vh', autoAlpha: 0 }, { y: 0, autoAlpha: 1, duration: dur }, '-=0.6')
        .fromTo(paragraph2,    { y: '40vh', autoAlpha: 0 }, { y: 0, autoAlpha: 1, duration: dur }, '-=0.65')
        .fromTo(socialWrapper, { y: '40vh', autoAlpha: 0 }, { y: 0, autoAlpha: 1, duration: dur }, '-=0.7');
    }

    // Portfolio grid fade-in (always grid layout inside)
    if (grid2) {
      openTL
        .set(grid2, { display: 'grid' })
        .to(grid2, { autoAlpha: 1, duration: durFast, ease: 'power2.out' }, '-=0.2');
    }

    // CLOSE timeline
    const closeTL = gsap.timeline({
      paused: true,
      onComplete() {
        opened.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        restoreBon(); // bring back BON button
        unlockScroll(); // restore the original scroll position
      }
    });

    closeTL
      .to(rightPane, { xPercent: 100, duration: prefersReduced ? 0 : 0.3, ease: 'power1.in' })
      .to(leftPane,  { autoAlpha: 0,  duration: prefersReduced ? 0 : 0.3, ease: 'power1.out' }, '<')
      .set(opened,   { display: 'none' })
      .set(circle,   { display: 'block', width: '0vw', height: '0vw' })
      .set(headerSection, { zIndex: 6 })
      .set(announcement,  { zIndex: 7 });

    // Triggers
    if (secondBtn) {
      secondBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        openTL.play(0);
      });
    }
    if (fixedMiddle) {
      fixedMiddle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        const btn = e.target.closest('.btn');
        if (btn) return; // let actual button click through
        e.preventDefault();
        openTL.play(0);
      });
    }
    if (closeBtn) {
      closeBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        closeTL.play(0);
      });
    }

    // Esc to close
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape' && opened.style.display !== 'none') {
        closeTL.play(0);
      }
    });

    // If breakpoint changes while open, switch display mode seamlessly
    mq.addEventListener?.('change', () => {
      if (opened.style.display !== 'none') {
        opened.style.display = openedDisplay();
      }
    });
  });
});
</script>

settings.code:
<script>


document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  // Timeline
  const tl = gsap.timeline({ paused: true, repeat: 0, yoyo: false, repeatDelay: 0 });

  tl.addLabel("test logo start");
  tl.to("footer-logo", { opacity: 0.0, duration: 0.3, ease: "linear" }, "+=0.0");
  tl.addLabel("footer logo last");
  tl.to("footer-logo", { opacity: 1.0, duration: 0.3, ease: "linear" }, "+=0.0");

  if (window.matchMedia("(min-width: 992px)").matches || window.matchMedia("(min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 991px)").matches || window.matchMedia("(min-width: 480px) and (max-width: 767px)").matches || window.matchMedia("(max-width: 479px)").matches) {
    document.querySelectorAll("footer-logo").forEach(el => {
      el.addEventListener('click', () => tl.restart());
    });
  }
});

</script>

<script>
(function () {
  // ====== CONFIG ======
  const HEADER_OFFSET = null; // e.g., 80 to force a fixed offset; null = auto-detect sticky header height
  const QUERY_KEYS = ['id', 'scroll', 'scrollTo', 'section', 'target']; // where to read the target id
  const CLICK_KEYS = ['click', 'clickId', 'clickSelector'];             // optional: id/selector to click after scroll
  const CLICK_DELAY_MS = 120; // small delay so event listeners are bound
  const DEBUG = false;

  // Polyfill CSS.escape for older browsers
  if (typeof CSS === 'undefined' || typeof CSS.escape !== 'function') {
    window.CSS = window.CSS || {};
    CSS.escape = function (sel) {
      return (sel + '')
        .replace(/([ !"#$%&'()*+,.\/:;<=>?@\[\\\]^`{|}~])/g, '\\$1')
        .replace(/\0/g, '\uFFFD');
    };
  }

  function getFromQuery(keys) {
    const { search } = window.location;
    if (!search) return null;

    // handle bare "?some-id" for the ID case only
    if (keys === QUERY_KEYS && search[1] && !search.includes('=')) {
      const raw = decodeURIComponent(search.slice(1)).replace(/^#/, '').trim();
      return raw || null;
    }
    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);
    for (const k of keys) {
      const v = params.get(k);
      if (v) return decodeURIComponent(v).trim();
    }
    return null;
  }

  function getIdFromQuery() {
    const id = getFromQuery(QUERY_KEYS);
    return id ? id.replace(/^#/, '') : null;
  }

  function getClickFromQuery() {
    return getFromQuery(CLICK_KEYS);
  }

  function computeHeaderOffset() {
    if (typeof HEADER_OFFSET === 'number') return HEADER_OFFSET;
    const header = document.querySelector(
      '.header, .site-header, #shopify-section-header, header[role="banner"], .announcement-bar, .header-wrapper'
    );
    if (!header) return 0;
    const style = window.getComputedStyle(header);
    const isFixed = /fixed|sticky/.test(style.position);
    return isFixed ? header.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;
  }

  function findTargetById(id) {
    if (!id) return null;
    let el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) return el;
    const esc = CSS.escape(id);
    el = document.querySelector('[data-scroll-id="' + esc + '"], a[name="' + esc + '"]');
    return el || null;
  }

  function findClickTarget(selOrId, scope) {
    if (!selOrId) return null;
    // allow CSS selectors if value starts with '#' or '.'
    if (/^[#.]/.test(selOrId)) {
      return (scope || document).querySelector(selOrId);
    }
    // otherwise treat as id first, then data-scroll-id
    const byId = (scope || document).getElementById(selOrId);
    if (byId) return byId;
    const esc = CSS.escape(selOrId);
    return (scope || document).querySelector('[data-scroll-id="' + esc + '"]');
  }

  function waitFor(fnFind, timeoutMs = 8000) {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const immediate = fnFind();
      if (immediate) return resolve(immediate);

      const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
        const found = fnFind();
        if (found) {
          obs.disconnect();
          resolve(found);
        }
      });
      obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });

      setTimeout(() => {
        obs.disconnect();
        resolve(fnFind());
      }, timeoutMs);
    });
  }

  function scrollToEl(el) {
    const offset = computeHeaderOffset();
    const top = el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset - offset;
    if (DEBUG) console.log('[ScrollToID] Scroll top:', top, 'offset:', offset, 'el:', el);
    window.scrollTo({ top, behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  function safeClick(el) {
    if (!el || el.dataset._autoClicked === '1') return;
    el.dataset._autoClicked = '1';
    try { el.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch (_) {}
    if (DEBUG) console.log('[ScrollToID] Clicking:', el);
    // Use native click (dispatches handlers). If blocked, also dispatch a MouseEvent.
    el.click?.();
    try {
      const ev = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window });
      el.dispatchEvent(ev);
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  async function init() {
    const id = getIdFromQuery();
    const clickParam = getClickFromQuery();
    if (!id) {
      if (DEBUG) console.log('[ScrollToID] No id found in query.');
      return;
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      await new Promise((r) => document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', r, { once: true }));
    }

    const targetEl = await waitFor(() => findTargetById(id));
    if (!targetEl) {
      if (DEBUG) console.warn('[ScrollToID] Element not found for id:', id);
      return;
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(() => scrollToEl(targetEl));

    // Auto-click rule 1: if the target itself is an <a>, click it.
    let toClick = targetEl.tagName && targetEl.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'a' ? targetEl : null;

    // Auto-click rule 2 (optional): if &click=... is provided, click that element (global or within the target section)
    if (!toClick && clickParam) {
      toClick = await waitFor(() => findClickTarget(clickParam, targetEl) || findClickTarget(clickParam, document));
    }

    if (toClick) {
      setTimeout(() => safeClick(toClick), CLICK_DELAY_MS);
    }
  }

  init();
})();
</script>

settings.title: scroller
settings.code:
<script>
/**
 * Bullet-proof "scroll to ID and center" (no down-then-up).
 * Usage: /page?id=TargetID  (also supports ?scrollTo=, ?goto=, ?scroll=)
 *
 * Guarantees:
 * - Single smooth tween in the measured direction.
 * - At most one correction in the SAME direction (never reverses).
 * - Tiny layout shifts are ignored (dead-band + hysteresis).
 * - Optional: clean URL params after success; prevent soft-reload retriggers.
 *
 * Debugging:
 * - Set DEBUG=true to see detailed logs in the console.
 */
(function () {
  // ======= CONFIG =======
  const PARAM_KEYS        = ['id', 'scrollTo', 'goto', 'scroll'];
  const ERASE_FROM_URL    = true;    // clean ?id=... after finishing
  const EXTRA_OFFSET_PX   = 0;       // manual nudge (+down / -up)
  const EPS_PX            = 2;       // sub-pixel tolerance
  const DEAD_BAND_PX      = 18;      // ignore corrections within this range
  const TWEEN_MS          = 600;     // main smooth scroll duration
  const CORRECTION_MS     = 380;     // correction duration if needed
  const STABILIZE_WAIT_MS = 300;     // small wait to let layout settle (images/fonts/sticky)
  const MAX_WAIT_MS       = 8000;    // max time to wait for the element to appear
  const BLOCK_OPPOSITE_CORRECTION = true;     // NEVER reverse direction
  const ALLOW_OPPOSITE_IF_DELTA_GE = Infinity; // set to e.g. 120 if you want rare opposite fix
  const USE_REENTRY_GUARD  = true;   // prevent re-run on soft reload/back-forward
  const DEBUG              = true;   // console logs

  // Header candidates that may overlay top edge
  const HEADER_SELECTORS = [
    '[data-sticky]',
    '.shopify-section-header-sticky',
    '.shopify-section--header',
    '.header-sticky',
    'header.sticky',
    '.site-header.sticky',
    '#shopify-section-header',
    'header[style*="position:sticky"]',
    'header[style*="position: sticky"]',
    'header[style*="position:fixed"]',
    'header[style*="position: fixed"]'
  ].join(',');

  // ======= UTILS =======
  const log = (...args) => DEBUG && console.log('[center-scroll]', ...args);

  function getQueryTargetId() {
    const usp = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    for (const k of PARAM_KEYS) {
      if (usp.has(k)) {
        let v = usp.get(k) || '';
        v = decodeURIComponent(v).trim();
        if (v.startsWith('#')) v = v.slice(1);
        if (v) return v;
      }
    }
    return null;
  }

  function waitForElementById(id, timeoutMs) {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const deadline = performance.now() + timeoutMs;
      const tick = () => {
        const el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) return resolve(el);
        if (performance.now() >= deadline) return resolve(null);
        setTimeout(tick, 100);
      };
      if (document.readyState === 'complete' || document.readyState === 'interactive') tick();
      else document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', tick, { once: true });
    });
  }

  function getOverlayHeaderHeight() {
    let total = 0;
    document.querySelectorAll(HEADER_SELECTORS).forEach((el) => {
      const cs = getComputedStyle(el);
      if (!cs) return;
      const fixedOrSticky = cs.position === 'fixed' || cs.position === 'sticky';
      if (!fixedOrSticky) return;
      const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (r.height > 0 && r.top <= 0 && r.bottom > 0) {
        total += r.height || el.offsetHeight || 0;
      }
    });
    if (DEBUG) log('header overlay height =', total);
    return total + EXTRA_OFFSET_PX;
  }

  function getViewportDims() {
    const vv = window.visualViewport;
    const dims = { height: vv ? vv.height : window.innerHeight, offsetTop: vv ? vv.offsetTop : 0 };
    if (DEBUG) log('viewport dims =', dims);
    return dims;
  }

  function computeTargetScrollY(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const pageY = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
    const { height: vpH, offsetTop: vpOff } = getViewportDims();
    const headerH = getOverlayHeaderHeight();

    const elCenterY = pageY + rect.top + rect.height / 2;
    const viewportTopY = pageY + vpOff;
    const desiredCenterY = (viewportTopY + headerH) + (vpH - headerH) / 2;

    let y = elCenterY - desiredCenterY;

    // Clamp to bounds
    const doc = document.documentElement;
    const maxScroll = Math.max(0, (doc.scrollHeight || 0) - vpH);
    y = Math.min(maxScroll, Math.max(0, y));

    if (DEBUG) log('computeTargetScrollY =>', y, { rect, pageY, headerH, vpH, vpOff });
    return y;
  }

  function easeInOutCubic(t) {
    return t < 0.5 ? 4 * t * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 3) / 2;
  }

  function animateScrollTo(targetY, durationMs) {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const startY = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
      const delta = targetY - startY;
      if (Math.abs(delta) <= 1) {
        log('animate: already within 1px, skipping');
        return resolve({ startY, targetY, delta });
      }
      log(`animate: ${startY} → ${targetY} (Δ=${delta}) dur=${durationMs}ms`);

      let rafId = 0, start = 0, userInterrupted = false;
      const onUserScroll = () => { userInterrupted = true; };
      window.addEventListener('wheel', onUserScroll, { passive: true, once: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchstart', onUserScroll, { passive: true, once: true });
      window.addEventListener('keydown', onUserScroll, { passive: true, once: true });

      function frame(ts) {
        if (!start) start = ts;
        const t = Math.min(1, (ts - start) / durationMs);
        const y = startY + delta * easeInOutCubic(t);
        window.scrollTo(0, y);
        if (userInterrupted) {
          cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
          log('animate: user interrupted; stopping');
          return resolve({ startY, targetY, delta, interrupted: true });
        }
        if (t < 1) rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
        else resolve({ startY, targetY, delta, interrupted: false });
      }
      rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);
    });
  }

  function removeParamFromURL() {
    const usp = new URLSearchParams(location.search);
    PARAM_KEYS.forEach((k) => usp.delete(k));
    const q = usp.toString();
    const newUrl = location.pathname + (q ? '?' + q : '') + location.hash;
    history.replaceState(null, '', newUrl);
    log('url cleaned');
  }

  function currentCenterDelta(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const { height: vpH } = getViewportDims();
    const headerH = getOverlayHeaderHeight();
    const elCenterInViewport = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
    const desiredViewportCenter = headerH + (vpH - headerH) / 2;
    const delta = elCenterInViewport - desiredViewportCenter; // + => element is below center (needs scroll down)
    if (DEBUG) log('delta now =', delta, { elCenterInViewport, desiredViewportCenter });
    return delta;
  }

  // Avoid running twice on soft reload / back-forward cache
  function alreadyDid(id) {
    if (!USE_REENTRY_GUARD) return false;
    try {
      const key = 'centerScroll.did.' + id;
      if (sessionStorage.getItem(key)) return true;
      sessionStorage.setItem(key, '1');
      return false;
    } catch { return false; }
  }

  // ======= MAIN =======
  (async function run() {
    try { if ('scrollRestoration' in history) history.scrollRestoration = 'manual'; } catch {}

    const id = getQueryTargetId();
    if (!id) return;
    if (alreadyDid(id)) { log('skip: re-entry guard'); return; }

    const target = await waitForElementById(id, MAX_WAIT_MS);
    if (!target) { log('target not found in time'); return; }

    // Let layout stabilize a hair (images/fonts/sticky compute)
    const waitStabilize = new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, STABILIZE_WAIT_MS));
    const waitFonts = (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready) ? document.fonts.ready.catch(()=>{}) : Promise.resolve();
    await Promise.race([waitStabilize, waitFonts]); // whichever first, we don't want to stall forever

    // Double rAF to avoid measuring mid-paint
    await new Promise(r => requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(r)));

    // Compute first target and direction from actual Y delta
    const startY = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
    const firstY = computeTargetScrollY(target);
    const initialDeltaY = firstY - startY;
    const initialDirection = Math.sign(initialDeltaY) || 0; // +1 down, -1 up, 0 none
    log('initial:', { startY, firstY, initialDeltaY, initialDirection });

    // First smooth scroll
    await animateScrollTo(firstY, TWEEN_MS);

    // One correction (same direction only) if truly off-center
    let deltaNow = currentCenterDelta(target);
    const deltaAbs = Math.abs(deltaNow);
    const directionNow = Math.sign(deltaNow) || 0;
    log('post-first:', { deltaNow, directionNow });

    const opposite = (initialDirection && directionNow && directionNow !== initialDirection);
    const oppositeTooBig = deltaAbs >= ALLOW_OPPOSITE_IF_DELTA_GE;

    if (deltaAbs <= Math.max(DEAD_BAND_PX, EPS_PX)) {
      log('correction: skip (dead-band)');
    } else if (opposite && BLOCK_OPPOSITE_CORRECTION && !oppositeTooBig) {
      log('correction: skip (opposite direction blocked)');
    } else {
      // If opposite is allowed (very large error), it may visually reverse.
      if (opposite && oppositeTooBig) log('correction: opposite allowed due to large delta');
      const y2 = computeTargetScrollY(target);
      await animateScrollTo(y2, CORRECTION_MS);
      log('correction: done');
    }

    if (ERASE_FROM_URL) removeParamFromURL();
    log('done');
  })();
})();
</script>

<style>

h3 {
    margin-top: 20px;
    font-size: 24px;
    line-height: 30px;
    color: black;
}


a:hover, button:hover, [role=button]:hover, input:hover, label:hover, select:hover, textarea:hover {
    opacity: 0.8;
}
.portfolio-image-item {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
}
.age-gate-overlay {
    
    background: rgb(0 0 0 / 70%);
   
}
/* Set your header height here (static). Update this if your header size changes at breakpoints */
:root {
  --header-h: 72px; /* sanity check: match your sticky header’s real height */
}

/* Smooth native scroll (no JS animations) */
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

/* Let the page snap to “centers” when the browser jumps to #hash */
html, body {
  scroll-snap-type: y proximity; /* or 'mandatory' if you prefer a strict snap */
  /* Shift the snapping viewport to ignore the header overlay */
  scroll-padding-top: var(--header-h);
}

/* When the element is targeted via #hash, center it in the viewport */
:target {
  /* Put the element’s center at the visual center minus header */
  scroll-margin-top: calc(50vh - 50% - var(--header-h));
  scroll-snap-align: center;
}

</style>
